docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $620.00 FILED BY HARTRICK MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT GREENE AMANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREENE AMANDA
SERVICE UNTIMELY, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HEAR. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-31-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-09-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARTRICK MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENE AMANDA $1,303.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,311.00, 1460 SUTTER ST #12 $620 DEC, $620 JAN, $63-3 DAYS FEB,= $1303, DAMAGE TO ACCRUE @$20.66 A DAY WHILE DEFT REMAINS IN POSS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
